description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in a matching short-sleeve top and pants set, featuring a loose fit and a simple, utilitarian design. The person has medium-length hair styled in a low ponytail with a side part, and their facial features are stylized and neutral. The figure stands upright with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose stance. The clothing appears to be a uniform, possibly for institutional or work-related settings, and the shoes are closed-toe and practical. The overall build is average, with no visible accessories or carried items. The surface of the figure is matte and smooth, with minimal textural detail.
description: An adult figure in a utilitarian uniform with a low ponytail, standing upright with arms outstretched. The clothing is simple and the shoes are practical, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and the uniform's front details, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the ponytail, and the straight side seam of the uniform.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, ponytail, and the back of the uniform, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, ponytail, and the uniform's side seam.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve uniform top and matching pants with a loose, utilitarian fit
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length low ponytail with a side part
